name: nestor-plugins
description: NodeNestor plugin collection for Claude Code — memory, context, and productivity tools

plugins.name: rolling-context
plugins.description: Transparent proxy that compresses old messages in the background using Haiku while keeping recent messages fully verbatim. Zero config, zero latency, uses your existing auth.

plugins.name: claude-knowledge-graph
plugins.description: Long-term memory for Claude Code — knowledge graph with entities, relationships, semantic search, auto-extraction from sessions, and context injection via hooks.

plugins.name: claude-autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous iterative improvement for any project — auto-detects type, generates fitness functions, runs experiments in a keep/revert loop with git tracking. Inspired by karpathy/autoresearch.

plugins.name: claude-autofix
plugins.description: Auto-test and lint after every edit — catches errors immediately, feeds them back to Claude for self-correction. Like Aider's killer feature, as a plugin.

plugins.name: claude-guardian
plugins.description: Self-learning convention enforcer — watches project patterns, auto-generates .claude/rules files, prevents architectural drift. Zero-config, learns over time.

plugins.name: claude-workflows
plugins.description: Declarative YAML workflow engine — define workflows triggered by hooks or cron, with sequential steps, conditions, and agent actions. GitHub Actions for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-worktrees
plugins.description: Parallel experiment orchestrator — try N approaches in isolated git worktrees, evaluate each, merge the winner. Multi-agent coordination made simple.

plugins.name: claude-spawn
plugins.description: Spawn containerized Claude Code agents with plugins, optional desktop/GPU, and SSH/tmux access. The orchestrator plugin.

plugins.name: ue5-ultimate-mcp
plugins.description: Control Unreal Engine 5 from Claude Code — 158 tools for Blueprints, Materials, Sequencer, AI, Niagara, World Gen, UI, and more. Use /setup-ue5 to auto-install into your UE5 project.

plugins.name: stitch
plugins.description: Google Stitch integration — design UIs from prompts, capture & analyze existing pages, pull refined designs back as framework-ready components. Bundles Stitch MCP + Playwright MCP.
